# Prem Hari S - Full Stack Developer Portfolio

## About
Prem Hari S is a Full Stack Developer based in Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India. He specializes in building modern web applications using the MERN stack and focuses on creating practical, user-friendly digital solutions.

## Skills
- **Languages**: JavaScript, TypeScript, Python, PHP, SQL
- **Frameworks**: React, Next.js, Node.js, Express.js, Tailwind CSS, Bootstrap
- **Tools**: Git, GitHub, MongoDB, MySQL, VS Code, Postman

## Projects
- **Scent Bite**: A perfume shop management system with real-time stock updates, billing, and product management.
- **Smart Parking System**: A booking-based parking system similar to theater seat selection.
- **GUVI Auth System**: Login, register, and profile system using MySQL, MongoDB, Redis with strict architecture rules.
- **Plant Disease Analyzer AI**: AI-based system trained on 10,000+ images to detect plant diseases with chatbot support.

## Content Structure
- `/`: Main portfolio with Hero, About, Skills, Experience, Projects, and Contact sections.
- `/resume`: View or download resume.
